data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding discount types.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific discount types, including code-based and automatic pricing. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these discount types. This lack of information leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence to assert a hard requirement failure is missing.
gaps: No evidence of discount types: percentage, fixed amount, free service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
